title: CosUserPreferences
description: Per-user dashboard preferences. Stored at ~/cos-pipeline-config-<tenant-slug>/users/<email>/preferences.json. One file per user, never co-mingled with shared/compiled data. Owned by the dashboard server; written via /admin or /pin/hide endpoints.

pinnedItems.description: Stable item IDs the user has pinned to the top of their feed (followUps, deals, recruiting items, etc.). Order = display order.

hiddenItems.description: Stable item IDs the user has dismissed/hidden from their feed. Server filters these from the /data response before returning.

tilesVisible.description: Tile IDs (matches dashboard-tiles.yaml id field) the user has chosen to render. Empty list = render all tiles allowed by their tier.

defaultLanding.description: URL path the user lands on after login. Must be a path the user is allowed to view per users.json.tiles.

theme.description: Visual theme. Per global rule: light backgrounds only — dark themes are NOT supported.

notificationsMuted.description: If true, server suppresses email/push notifications for this user (digest, follow-up nudges). Pipeline still runs; just skips delivery.

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last write. Server stamps this on every save.
